scope.summary: Config load desugars Oracle username proxy_user[target_schema] shorthand into typed proxy_auth or fails before Oracle with an actionable redacted error.
out_of_scope: The current uncommitted core/connect.rs buffer, which mixes B9a test coverage with unrelated A1b/C5 and B16a edits.
A live Oracle proxy CONNECT THROUGH authentication run.

entry_points.name: strict config loader proxy-bracket normalization
entry_points.trace: `env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo test -p oraclemcp-config proxy_bracket -- --nocapture` exited 0 at 481e080b with 3 passed; it proves username = "MCP_PROXY[APP_OWNER]" desugars into typed proxy_auth before validation, quoted identifiers are preserved, brackets inside a quoted ordinary username are ignored, malformed/empty/proxy-only syntax fails before Oracle, duplicate bracket plus [profiles.proxy_auth] fails, and error text does not echo proxy identities.

entry_points.name: discovery/setup profile template parity
entry_points.trace: `env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo test -p oraclemcp-config --test discovery_writer_parity -- --nocapture` exited 0 at 481e080b with 5 passed; it proves the generated annotated profile output includes the [profiles.proxy_auth] section and still round-trips through the strict loader.

entry_points.name: example config parses with proxy-auth reference shape
entry_points.trace: `env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo test -p oraclemcp-config --test example_config_parses -- --nocapture` exited 0 at 481e080b with 1 passed; it proves oraclemcp.example.toml's proxy-auth documentation shape remains accepted by the strict loader.

limitations: This close is config-load and documentation/template proof only; it does not claim a live Oracle proxy authentication run.
This close does not run a workspace-wide Cargo gate.
Dirty files outside this bead's source scope remain in the shared checkout; they are excluded from tree_clean by the close auditor.
